name: talent-augmenting-layer
description: Personalised AI augmentation that makes you better at your work, not dependent on AI. Creates skill profiles, calibrates AI friction levels, tracks skill progression, and prevents de-skilling.
long_description:
The Talent-Augmenting Layer (TAL) is a research-backed system that personalises how AI interacts with you based on your expertise levels, goals, and growth areas.

**What it does:**
- Runs a conversational onboarding assessment to build your personalised profile
- Classifies every task as automate, augment, coach, protect, or hands-off
- Calibrates AI friction — adds challenge where you're learning, removes it where you're expert
- Tracks skill progression over time and warns about potential de-skilling
- Provides coaching sessions tailored to your growth domains

**Based on research by** Buçinca (Harvard), Acemoglu (MIT), and Mollick (Wharton) on AI-human complementarity, cognitive forcing, and contrastive explanations.

**All data stays local** — profiles are stored as markdown files on your machine. No cloud, no API keys needed.

tools.name: talent_get_profile
tools.description: Load a user's full profile with expertise map, calibration, and task classification

tools.name: talent_get_calibration
tools.description: Get compact calibration JSON for injecting into any LLM system prompt

tools.name: talent_classify_task
tools.description: Classify a task as automate, augment, coach, protect, or hands-off

tools.name: talent_log_interaction
tools.description: Log an interaction for skill progression tracking

tools.name: talent_get_progression
tools.description: Get skill progression analysis with growth/atrophy signals

tools.name: talent_status
tools.description: Comprehensive status report with calibration, progression, and recommendations

tools.name: talent_delete_profile
tools.description: Delete a user's profile and interaction logs

tools.name: talent_save_profile
tools.description: Save or update a user's profile

tools.name: talent_assess_start
tools.description: Start the onboarding assessment (returns protocol for the LLM)

tools.name: talent_assess_score
tools.description: Compute TALRI scores from raw assessment answers

tools.name: talent_assess_create_profile
tools.description: Generate and save a profile from assessment data

tools.name: talent_suggest_domains
tools.description: Suggest expertise domains based on role and industry

tools.name: talent_parse_telemetry
tools.description: Parse telemetry blocks from LLM responses and log them

prompts.name: talent-system
prompts.description: Full TAL system prompt with user profile injected
prompts.text: Load the Talent-Augmenting Layer system prompt for {name}, including their personalised profile, calibration settings, and interaction guidelines.

prompts.name: talent-assess
prompts.text: Run the Talent-Augmenting Layer onboarding assessment for {name}. Ask questions conversationally, collect answers, compute scores, and generate a personalised profile.

prompts.name: talent-coach
prompts.description: Targeted coaching session on a specific skill
prompts.text: Start a coaching session for {name} focused on {domain}. Use contrastive explanations and progressive challenge based on their current skill level.

prompts.name: talent-update
prompts.description: Update profile based on recent interactions
prompts.text: Review recent interactions for {name} and update their Talent-Augmenting Layer profile with any observed skill changes, new goals, or adjusted calibration.

profiles_directory.title: Profiles Directory
profiles_directory.description: Where to store your TAL profile and interaction logs. Defaults to ~/.talent-augmenting-layer/profiles
